name: SP3ND — Buy from Amazon & eBay with USDC
description: Buy products from Amazon and eBay using USDC on Solana. 0% platform fee, no KYC, free Prime shipping on Amazon, 200+ countries, fully autonomous via x402 payment protocol.

SP3ND_API_SECRET.description: API secret from POST /registerAgent (shown once — save immediately)

AGENT_WALLET_PATH.description: Path to Solana wallet JSON file (defaults to ./.wallet.json)

solana_wallet.description: Solana keypair holding USDC — the agent generates this autonomously, then a human funds it

security.spending_note: Once funded, the agent can spend USDC without per-transaction human approval. Fund the wallet only with amounts you're comfortable with the agent spending autonomously. See SKILL.md for optional human-approval patterns.
